reviews.review_title: i swear it gets worse every update
reviews.review_description:
i played way back when this game was on app lab... So this isn't just some kid who tried the game one and came straight to the store page to cry

it used to be absolutely peak. But just around a couple of builds before 1.0, handling took a huge nose dive. Two handed weapons used to be like butter, now i feel like a noodle armed drunk. I used to be absolutely surgical with spear stabs... 

the combat also just isn't smooth... Sue me but its just stiff and awkward. And it has that "underwater" physics feel sometimes.

on with the enemies, my lord above it cannot be understated how FREQUENTLY goblins will throw stuff. If there are more than about 3 small goblins... Expect carpets of bombs and showers of knives. Its downright annoying. 

RNG is also horrid. Wont get a weapon worth a spat until you beat the End boss like 2 times. Ittl also give you something like a ranged weapon and then have a room event be melee buff (for enemies also) or half ranged damage. Or start you with a man's weapon before man's weapons are viable

TLDR; I always wonder why i don't play more often, then i pick it up and rember why. Reviews are raving but idk... I've been around since the beginning and it used to be so much better.

reviews.review_title: Has to be the best vr game of all time
reviews.review_description: Like, even including games like behemoth or blade and sorcery, I haven’t played those NEARLY as much as I’ve played this game. It has THE FUNNEST combat hands down, and the weapons and enemies actually feel interactive in a way where you have to use some skill to kill them or just overpower them with weapons. Btw the weapons and items are so cool, please buy this game and try it, refund it if you don’t like it, it’s a game I recommend to everyone I know who plays vr first over anything else.

reviews.review_title: amazing game. I have a good idea
reviews.review_description:
What if to make the game even more unique to finally beat other battle games and to give the ability to choke, npcs and players have the option to choke too.
However choking them would be too easy instead you could add it so that npcs if your choking them can fight back dealing damage, furthermore this ability could be restricted to bosses. Goblins/ normal enemies will be able to have this ability use on them, at first it will deal alot of damage but slowly as the enemy starts going unconscious the attacks will deal less and less damage until they die. For the player it could be the same except they could chop the arm of the enemy off, kill the enemy, or something else to get the enemy to unlatch, U can tell when they are about to latch on/ choke you as they will have a strong move similar to bosses where U can react to dodge it. ANYWAYS U add what U want Ur games amazing I just thought to make it even more cinematic

I’ll be honest, this game has MUCH potential. Yes, combat is fun at times, but it’s so janky that I can’t experience that fun! Enemies in general take way too long to kill, have absurd range, and downright annoying attacks. The ghouls especially. And the music doesn’t help, because there is no way in hell that someone composed for this, because it’s just not an ear pleaser. I’ll give credit where it’s due, (when able to preform correctly) the parrying and overall mechanics are neat, unique and fun! But I feel that the dev team needs more members or ;honestly; smarter people.

reviews.review_title: Just buy it. With a caveat.
reviews.review_description:
This game is to Blade and Sorcery what calculus is to the school math course.
The enemies are fast and smart, even lower tier enemies will keep you on your toes, the mid and low tier enemies will most probably make you want to smash your controllers :)
Though when you figure out the tactics to defeat the enemies, the satisfaction of the victory is immense.
Weapon variety is great, sometimes on the edge of wacky. You can easily have a revolver in one hand and a mace in the other. The weapons behave way differently, though following real-world logic. For example: 
Spear-longe range stabs and powerful strikes withe hilt from up close.
Swords-jacks of all trades, two-handed swords are cool and insanely powerful.
Maces and blunt weapons-HULK SMASH! They ignore armor and ragdoll enemies.
Axes-reward precision with huge damage.
Daggers-stabby stabby enemies die, don't have reach and not good for blocking. Stab to the head or chest area-instakill in 95% of cases.
There is magic as well. Different wands and spells.
Lightning magic is goated. UNLIMITED POOOWEER!

Overall, the best melee game I've tried and one of the best VR games overall.
P.S. There are also mods, haven't tried them, still having too much fun with the vanilla campaign.

reviews.review_title: The game is just not for me. I think I’l
reviews.review_description: ￼ The only reason I said the game was not for me is because it just didn’t give me the satisfaction. Bones are hard to break, and the servers are laggy due to it being experimental. I’m gonna give it a little bit of grace, but otherwise I don’t think I want this game so I’m gonna write a one star because I just don’t find it appealing to my type of audience.

reviews.review_title: Enjoy the game, but boss fights suck
reviews.review_description: I find the combat in this game to be fantastic, being able to combo attacks and the variety in weapons lead to great gameplay. The only issue I have with the game is the boss fights especially in challenge mode, you either need to get lucky and get a weapon that ignores armor and does loads of damage or just die from the boss killing you or exhaustion from having to wave your arms about.

DEVS!!! This game Needs multi player/co-op mode, we should be able to host lobbies for co-op dungeon crawling and this game will be Perfect! 

I truly love this game and have had it since the demo on app lab. Even then this game stood out even while blade and sorcery has grown in popularity. A more immersive experience because it has a story line levels and upgrades. The mod menu is the cherry on top. I have enjoyed mods and overall gameplay much more in battle talent than blade and sorcery. 

I noticed this game keeps me in great shape burning 700 almost daily. Gameplay is addictive and highly replay able. I just purchased the quest 3 and I’ll update this, and

Everyone in my opinion battle talent is nearly perfect but the one thing that makes me annoyed is the spell crystals the fact that you have to manually switch between crystal to crystal when you want to use spells is annoying in my opinion I think the game would be so much better if they added a crystal that when you put it on you could insert multiple crystals at a time allowing you to use more spells than having to switch crystals every 20 seconds over all I’d advise you get it and blade and sorcery because imagine the blade and sorcery spell wheel in battle talent then that would be incredible

reviews.review_title: Maybe a blade and sorcery competitor
reviews.review_description:
This game is basically blade and sorcery, heres a list of things that are different.

There are mesh cut mods
For NPCs

There are rpg like bosses/enemies

There are more updates, for example, blade and sorcery is having its last update soon, meanwhile battle talent has a new update nearly every other month

There are not better sword mechanics but there are arguably better fighting mechanics.

Thats about it. I like how this games is a lot lile blade and sorcerh but has a lot of rpg mechanics that make it its own separate game. I love the ugc mods, blade and sorcery does have better spell mods though, but i think battle talent is still great. One thing I'd love to see is a collab update or game with warpfrog and the devs of battle talent.

The new outfits are beautiful and the ranger skin looks bad as AF now we need a range weapon update. A cool idea would be allowing the bullets from the revolver or pistol to bounce or rickashay off the armor of the enemy or a weapon your teammate is holding. 
      Another idea would be that the guns or bows could get a skill called dead eye which allowed the user to get a damage multiply by hitting the same spot on the enemy or in slow motion.
      Can wait for nether next dungeon update

reviews.review_title: Alright listen. This game had nothing...
reviews.review_description:
Genuinely that's not an exaggeration!
I was here since it was on SideQuest, and since then the game has gone through a lot. adding almost everything to the game you see now. Back when it was only goblins and the only weapon you had was a sword and maybe a club. Now it has, so many different weapons, fighting styles for people to explore, magic that have genuinely cool mechanics just like the weapons. not only that, now there is enemy variety, new stages, environments, modes, multiplayer, optional Community mod support and Dev tools, Ect! However I will say a couple patches have messed with a few things like two handed weapons, but the combat is still fluid and engaging with the enemy. Now I'd like to address the people who do not agree with what they paid for. I hope they do realize that there is a demo for battle talent, and if you are still on the fence of buying this game just play the demo. then come back if you think it's worth the purchase. overall this is a solid pick of a game that can contend with others of its caliber or even greater! Also this review of mine could be written off as a glaze but I am sincere in what I say, give it a shot at least through the free demo.

Also if any Devs are reading this, congrats on making it with this game! 

Also, This is not a jab at the Devs, I only wish this game had was native moding tools along with map making capabilities using predetermined assets. maybe in the second game... Lol, take care and have a good day!

This game is so fun and will keep you entertained and engaged the entire time while playing this if you don’t like it fine refund but I think you will really like this game the weapons are awesome and the enemies are cool and actually take a little skill to kill and playing with friends just makes it better  and in highly recommend to anyone looking for a sandbox and fighting game this is definitely worth checking out the devs did an amazing job with this I have an idea like if you could add a companion type thing either with animals or humans/npcs and they help you fight enemies and follow you around and if you could like take npcs and they actually walk instead of collapsing I just feel like that would make it more interesting and diverse but and if you could check this out please but other than than that this game is amazing great job devs

Although i did wish there was like a cinematic mode for content creators because its very hard to make realistic-ish videos while playing because of the UI and stuff. But still very fun   😝

reviews.review_title: Very fun but some parts are annoying
reviews.review_description:
The fighting feels really nice except for some weapons, mainly the really heavy two-handed weapons. The headset doesn’t really know where your hands are if you don’t look at them, only where they’re facing, so when you do a large swing, it feels clunky and the huge weight doesn’t help at all, to the point where hand maces are better than heavy weapons in all categories. 

My main issue was with the first Orc boss, the one with the sword. His movement were easy to read and parry except for his spin attack, where he jams his elbow in your face and due to the collision physics, he slide backwards when he spins, so he can hit you without you being able to parry him bc his arm is in the way up until his sword is in your face. 
I tried everything; jumping over him (the sword registers behind him when he swings forward) using the bow (no damage and the knockback doesn’t do anything)
In the end, the only way I won was by upgrading my health 6 times and using the goblin’s weapons because they deal more damage than the fire sword the game gives you.

Multiplayer is fun but I have one problem: LATENCY.  I know that it is still in development, but PLEASE FIX THE LATENCY. 
Good game.
Please add some type of way to choke, and maybe some type of stay mode where you can see the insides of them maybe as a spell? These would be awesome, maybe more realistic dismemberment too,

I love this game and I love the camp update, now this might be a litttle fetched but I have an idea I would really to see to expand apron the camp and the story. So say you start the story mode and your in talent temple and I don’t know when you would unlock it but there would be a portal to the camp the only place not touched by the dark lord, the camp will start of as lackluster and empty but as you get through the campaign you can grow you camp and attract more people to it (probably just humans but monsters would still be cool or you could get elves so they can finally do something). And like the unique dungeon and parkour levels there would also be army skirmishes. To do well in these you would need to go to your barracks and there you will be able to unlock new units like archers, mages, or generals. Then you could take your squad to help you fight in these army skirmishes. And you could even have a multiplayer version of this where it’s one players army bs the others. You could also have the merchant in town and even though you would still have to buy the weapons at talent temple you could buy weapons from him and it just means they will guarantee be in the next dungeon level or skirmish. And the big thing of it is eventually it goes from a simple empty camp to your own play grou-uh fortress of your to do what you please there and after the entire game of y your troops the final level before fighting the darklord would be storming the fortress of the dark fortress with your army fighting some of the most challenging enemies yet before you get to your 1v1 with the dark lord in these next level. Now I know this is meant to be a souls like so I’m not telling you to change your whole game but A. I love sandbox army battles you can set up. B. I love the camp addition. And C. I really want the story mode to be expanded upon. Oh and D. Even if this doesn’t get added I still love this game and its combat because it’s genuinely the best in any sword fighting medieval game I’ve ever played so yeah would recommend.

THIS GAME IS GREAT BUT ALL THE KIDS ARE SAYING "oh it's got bad graphics" "oh it's not like blade and sorcery" DON'T LISTEN TO THEM BECAUSE ALL THEY CAN HANDLE IS GORILLA TAG KNOCK OFFS!! 

The game has it's ups and downs but the kids can't use weapons like weapons and they complain so much, vr has been rotted by gorilla tag, I liked it when I first played it years ago but as soon as it became popular everyone coppied it, all the kids that play vr all play knock offs, not to mention companies are making slop games in vr and charging like £20 for them, if you wanted blade and sorcery buy that, battle talent is a different game with different developers, they can't just give the game ultra realistic graphics, it's a vr game, you want an ultra realistic fighting experience, buy a great pc, buy a pc vr, buy blade and sorcery on steam, hook it all up and play that, I'm sick and tired of hearing the same words from kids.


This review isn't hating on gorilla tag or the knock offs but instead it's hating on the slop that is most vr games, if you're going to get a vr game look at it's screenshots and it's trailer then look at YouTube or something then buy it if you want, and for the kids that all repeat themselves, just go back to your slop and leave the rest of us alone.


Hello vr community I decided to update this, if you want a realistic vr fighting game, I would recommend blade and sorcery on PC with the new steam frame when it comes out in 2026 but the rumors are that it's going to be £699 or £799 but as valve does, it'll be the best vr on the market when it drops, it can connect to your PC with a USB no wires needed, it's going to destroy the Meta quest 3 and I've been playing on the original oculus quest 2 for years and I only have a little stick drift and less battery but a power bank fixes that and I don't care about the stick drift since I started to swap the controls, anyway, the vr community is still rotted, I still see 6 year olds pretending that they're cool because they play Gorrila tag, I hate this community, but anyone who hates Gorrila tag and the stain that it is, I consider you as a friend and not a rotted child, if you buy games that look horrible and complain that's on you. 

Also, stay away from vr chat, it was a good concept but now its dangerous to go on it regardless of age, the stuff you get exposed to is insane, theres people that are in there who belong in an insane asylum.

I can't tell whats worse, vr chat community or the Gorrila tag kids who consume so much slop that I'll be surprised if they can live by themselves for a day without technology.

Battle talent still proves to be one of my favorite games of all time not just on vr, if the devs read this, please for the love of God make a way to paint your character for free, also don't listen to the kids they can't go five seconds without saying two numbers and laughing, keep up the Incredible work devs :)

reviews.review_title: You feel like an anime character
reviews.review_description: Very skillbased, good graphics, great mechanics, engaging combat and gameplay. Though I wish that the graphics weren’t as pale and greyish. It lacks color contrast. Although I love that the movement requires physical movement, I don’t very smooth. Blade and sorcery + better movement mod is much smoother. Try to take inspiration from that! Sometimes I also feel like the slow searching magic balls and the bombs that the goblins throw are a bit lame. But I love this game!! This was just some feedback. And the part when you buy new abilities and weapons could be more epic and dramaticc.
